title: Initial index of source HTML archive
objective: Create an initial manifest and starter summary of the downloaded HTML build archive
background: The workflow needs a first read-only inventory of the local source_html snapshot before deeper extraction work begins.

inputs.name: source_html_directory
inputs.description: Local archive snapshot scanned recursively without editing source files.

evaluation: Every file under source_html is listed in the manifest.
The summary records counts, obvious issues, and next steps.
No files inside source_html are modified.
notes: Initial scan found only the placeholder file source_html/.gitkeep and no HTML content yet.
